# UI Feedback Report

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | approved \| rejected \| feedback |
| **File** | path/to/reviewed-file.html |
| **Reviewer** | Reviewer Name |
| **Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

## Feedback

Write feedback here. Each line becomes an action item.

For best results, write one specific change per line:
- Change the header color to blue
- Make the card grid 3 columns instead of 4
- Add a search bar to the top app bar

---
